title: Cloud Guard Instance Security: High Severity Pivots
description: High-severity workload findings with MITRE, host, process, and network pivots.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Cloud Guard Instance Security Logs' and ('Finding Severity' = 'critical' or 'Finding Severity' = 'high' or 'Security Severity' = 'critical' or 'Security Severity' = 'high') | stats count as Findings, unique('Process Command Line') as Commands, unique('File Path') as Files by 'Host Name', 'Finding Name', 'MITRE Technique ID', 'Destination IP' | sort -Findings

candidates: SOC Cloud Guard Instance Security Logs
